basics.name: Abhijeet Singh
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Software Engineer with expertise in full‑stack development, cloud services, and AI‑driven applications. Experienced in building scalable back‑ends, RESTful APIs, and integrating machine‑learning features into production systems.

work.name: EasyRewardz Software Services Private Limited
highlights: Designed and developed micro‑services for the core rewards platform using Spring Boot and Node.js.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, Docker, and Kubernetes, reducing release cycle from weeks to days.
Integrated ML‑based recommendation models into the user‑facing dashboard, improving engagement metrics by ~12%.
Collaborated with product and UX teams to translate business requirements into technical specifications.
Mentored junior engineers and conducted code‑review sessions to maintain high code quality.

projects.name: Memory‑System Project
projects.description: A personal project that demonstrates a lightweight, in‑memory key‑value store with persistence, TTL eviction, and a simple RESTful API. Built to explore concurrency, caching strategies, and API design.
highlights: Implemented lock‑free data structures using Java’s java.util.concurrent package.
Provided a REST API with JSON payloads, supporting GET/PUT/DELETE operations.
Included a Dockerfile and docker‑compose for easy local testing.

interests.name: Technology & Writing
keywords: Technical blogging on Dev.to and LinkedIn
